{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = the Liberator
| aliases = The Liberator
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Liberator is a legendary figure rumored to be the future leader of humanity. Known for conducting a campaign of assassination against the [[Great Elders]] and their subordinates, this individual is credited with initiating a conflict against [[Nakothi]] that drew the attention of all [[Great Elders]]. Beyond his reputation as a warrior, he is recognized for his profound intellectual contributions; he has uncovered more ancient secrets of the [[Great Elders]] than any other human and developed the current classification system for malicious [[Intent]] and curses. He is also known by the titles [[Curse-breaker]] and Maze-walker.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[the Liberator{{!}}The Liberator]] is a figure known for murdering [[Great Elders]] and their servants.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[the Liberator{{!}}The Liberator]] started a war against [[Nakothi]] during the [[Elder War]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
